violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — ---Food employee did not wash hands as necessary.
Water Supply. — --Water source or system was not of sufficient capacity to meet the demands of the food establishment. -Water turned off at time of inspection.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Handle of faucet was broken which prompted owner to turn water off.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwashing was inaccessible at time of inspection.
